checks.name: .env.local secret handling
checks.evidence: .env.local was created/updated from /tmp/opensearch.md without printing values, chmod 0600, and is ignored by .gitignore.

checks.name: npm run opensearch:health
checks.evidence: Live provider returned OpenSearch 3.3.2, green cluster health, one node.

checks.name: npm run load:cranfield
checks.evidence: cranfield-v0 was created, 1,400 public Cranfield documents were indexed, and live count returned 1,400.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield -- --queries /private/tmp/retail-search-cranfield-live/queries.json --write experiments/cranfield-v0/evaluation-live.json --summary --concurrency 3
checks.evidence: 225-query live evaluation passed: MAP 0.2402, nDCG@10 0.2995, Precision@10 0.2316, Recall@10 0.3994, MRR 0.535.

checks.name: live search sanity check
checks.evidence: searchCranfield returned five live results for 'wing pressure distribution'; top result id 652; OpenSearch took 7 ms.

checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: 14 tests passed, MDE parse check passed, sample index check passed, fixture evaluation passed.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Cloudflare Worker deployment validation
blocked_or_skipped.reason: Deployment and external Cloudflare mutation were not approved in this turn.

blocked_or_skipped.name: public endpoint search/explain validation
blocked_or_skipped.reason: Worker is not deployed to public Cloudflare endpoints yet.

evidence_quality: Strong live OpenSearch evidence and local validation; public endpoint evidence remains blocked on Cloudflare deployment.
